archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast)
vibe: Indonesian Modern: Warm Utility. Grounded, tactile, reliable, premium but low cost friendly for UMKM.

rules: H1 should not exceed text-5xl on desktop, tight leading.
Labels must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-widest.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6 to p-12) for landing pages; Dense 'Control Room' for POS and Dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-lg (8px) for cards, rounded-md (6px) for buttons. Avoid pill shapes unless it's a badge.

buttons.primary: bg-[hsl(151,39%,17%)] text-white hover:bg-[hsl(151,39%,24%)] rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[hsl(9,65%,55%)] text-white hover:bg-[hsl(9,65%,60%)] rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-[hsl(36,15%,88%)] text-[hsl(0,0%,11%)] hover:bg-[hsl(36,17%,97%)] rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-colors

cards.pos_item: bg-white border border-[hsl(36,15%,88%)] rounded-lg p-4 hover:border-[hsl(151,39%,17%)] cursor-pointer transition-all hover:shadow-sm

inputs.default: border border-[hsl(36,15%,88%)] rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[hsl(151,39%,17%)] focus:border-transparent outline-none bg-white text-[hsl(0,0%,11%)]

landing.structure: Hero (Image swap to Indonesian cafe owner) -> Features (Tetris Grid) -> Pricing Teaser -> CTA -> Footer

pricing.structure: Header -> 4 Tier Cards (Trial, Starter, Growth, Enterprise) -> FAQ
pricing.highlight_tier: Growth tier gets hsl(9, 65%, 55%) (Terracotta) border and 'Most Popular' badge.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar Nav -> Topbar (Trial upgrade banner) -> Grid of KPIs -> Sales Chart
dashboard.grid_mode: Control Room grid: tight gaps (gap-4), max data visibility.

pos.structure: Left 70% (Bento Grid of Categories/Products) | Right 30% (Dense Cart/Receipt preview + Payment methods).
pos.interaction: Fast tap targets. Clear separation between Cash, QRIS, E-wallet.

products_crud.structure: Header with 'Import CSV/Excel' button -> Table of products.
products_crud.import_ui: Drag & Drop zone Modal, dashed border border-[hsl(36,15%,88%)] hover:border-[hsl(151,39%,17%)] bg-[hsl(36,17%,97%)].

image_urls.description: Young cashier/entrepreneur using a modern POS system in a minimalist cafe (Premium but realistic vibe)
Asian barista or shop owner looking confident in a warm-lit store

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text on Terracotta and Deep Green meets APCA standards.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cart items) MUST include data-testid='...' (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and Figtree (body) using Google Fonts or local assets.
Do NOT use generic purple/teal gradients. Stick to the Warm Utility palette (Deep Forest Green + Terracotta).
Build the POS dashboard with a dense, control-room layout (no wasted space, high functionality).
Ensure the PDF generation (Receipt/Invoice) uses clear tabular structures. Thermal receipt should be narrow (e.g., 80mm width layout) and Invoice should be A4.
Stripe is skipped. Focus on Xendit QRIS + e-wallet flow mockups/integrations.
Ensure the Pricing page clearly shows 4 tiers with the Growth tier highlighted.
